IS.notes: IS is unreliable for sequence models - trajectory-level weights have extremely high variance

WIS.notes: WIS suffers from same issues as IS for transformer policies

summary.ope_limitation: Standard OPE methods (IS, WIS, FQE, DR) are not well-suited for sequence-based models like Decision Transformer due to autoregressive action generation and high-dimensional trajectory dependencies
summary.recommendation: Use simulation-based evaluation as primary metric for DT policies

comparison_vs_cql.notes: Direct comparison not meaningful due to different estimation methods
